SOCIETY AND CULTURE
simple mistortune of  lying near war-torn borders. Most Periphery planets are Outback worlds with standards of living as far below the core worlds as Third World country was from First World one on ancient Terra What little technology exists I5 treated Iike miracle ad rarely taken for granted_ In some areas the incongruities can strike observers as ludicrous: hunt- ing game with bow and arrow Or nundred-year-old rifle_ oniy bring home and cook microwave_ In the remotest regions backwater planets_ merchant DropShip landing can be cause for local holiday: Most people on these worlds care nothing about politics, though those on border worlds tend to be avid followers military news_ Skirmishes_ victories, defeats and treaties can all have major impact on their lives_
Mechwarrior refrecher The akcoholic drink most  associaled wlth MechWarriors Is the PPC , named atter the BattleMech weapon: First intro- duced on Solarls VII; where few "manly" MechWarriors point- edly favored drink   has become stereotype MechWarrior fiction. In tact, most MechWarriors avold any drink that you have to swallow quickly before your mouth goes numb: Four shots of grain alcohol poured Into brandy snifter are the drinks basic element: Each variant of the PPC is named for a Great House , depending on what is used to dilute the grain alcohol. Steiner cuts with two shots peppermint schnapps_ Marik uses two shots of Ouzo, and Davion either two shots 0f bourbon 0r, in the Capellan March, tequila: The Liao variant cuts the drink with double shot of plum wine, the Kurita version with sake. Taking the grain alcohol straight is sometimes called Periphery PPC or just plain foolish:
LANGUAGE Humankind Iikely would never have reached the stars with- out common language through which scientists could share ideas_ common language opens up markets_ expands tech nology and brings people closer together By the twenty-first century, English had become the Iingua franca shared by most nations_ Terra adopted as the official language in 2092; by the time of the great colonial expansion most colony ships carried English with them: More than one interstellar nation, however; turned other tongues as primary languages, retaining English as anguage of trade and politics_ The population of the thirty first century is generally bilingual, speaking English as primary secondary language_ Many people speak three more languages, depending o their level ot education. Some nations nave developed their Own patois, such as the Swedenese blend of Swedish and Japanese spo ken in the Free Rasalhague Republic.
service t0 the state and parents are encouraged to show pride in children who better the family' $ socia position_ Both of these Asian influenced societies display sharp divi- sions between the workers and their social betters_ For exam- Combine encourages artistic expression only among the noble or warrior classes; ordinary workers rarely have the leisure for such pursuits_ In tne Capellan Confederation_ where work must always improve the state, much of the white-collar work force no longer exists_ Nonproductive positions such as independent lawyers and most middle managers were eliminat- parasitic leeches under  wnich only   the  degenerate Federated Commonwealth and Free Worlds League suffer; quote deceased Chancellor Romano Liao. At the other end of the spectrum lie the Free Worlds League and_ slightly lesser extent, the Lyran Alliance Both realms exhibit an individualistic streak, where children grow and search for 'their own angle_ The scion of prosperous well: placed family might follow in his or her parents footsteps but the average person   sees   nothing wrong with searching scamming -for an alternative It is no coincidence that the Free Worlds League contains higher proportion of lawyers than ay other nation; on some worlds _ they surpass the number of doc tors_
WORK Even the thirty-first century, many children follow their parents into careers On Outback worlds_ entire families often work side by side the same industry: Among the middle class es on all worlds, education largely determines who does what: Apprenticeship is the most common method of schooling; and most parents start their children early in learning trade Only the upper classes or citizens of more advanced, highly devel oped worlds can claim greater freedom of choice_ Upper-class children are born to privilege and most prefer stepping into parent' shoes to striking out on their own; With its neo-feudal system influencing most areas of life_ the Inner Sphere not easy on individualists In the Draconis Combine, which groups its people into four loosely defined classes, sons traditionally follow their fathers, while wives and daughters are   relegated t0 the home: Few break out of that pattern unless aptitude tests select child for further training: For all Combine citizens, the military an hon- orable alternative Even owly infantryman in the service of House Kurita garners some respect from the middlc ad lower classes The Capellan Confederation uses similar caste sys tem but encourages its citizens to seek higher caste they nave the talent for iL More important than family tradition is
FOOD AND ORINK Food and drink across the Inner Sphere vary from nation to nation and world to world: The Federated Commonwealth favors wnat is still known as Continental cuisine; Irom the old Terran continent of Europe The Lyran half of the Commonwealth leans toward German and Italian cooking_ while the Federated Suns half shows slight bias toward French ad Spanish fare Both substitute the bio engineered quillar; the largest crop the Commonwealth, for many of the usual ingredients. The quillar can be processed into severab textures and flavors making very versatile. Juices and sodas are the most popular nonalco
